import com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.Application def log = Application.getInstance().getGUILog() //code to access this slots.slots.value def getEnergy(partName) { def partSlot = THIS.getSlot().find { it.getDefiningFeature().getName() == partName } def partInst = partSlot.getValue().get(0).getInstance() def energySlot = partInst.getSlot().find { it.getDefiningFeature().getName() == "energyCons" } return energySlot.getValue().get(0).getValue() } def cmpEnergy = getEnergy("cmp") def cndEnergy = getEnergy("cnd") def evpEnergy = getEnergy("evp") def mdEnergy = getEnergy("md") def rdEnergy = getEnergy("rd") log.log("cmp energyCons = " + cmpEnergy) log.log("cnd energyCons = " + cndEnergy) log.log("evp energyCons = " + evpEnergy) log.log("md energyCons = " + mdEnergy) log.log("rd energyCons = " + rdEnergy) def totalEnergy = cmpEnergy + cndEnergy + evpEnergy + mdEnergy + rdEnergy return cmpEnergy < totalEnergy * 0.4 && cndEnergy < totalEnergy * 0.4 && evpEnergy < totalEnergy * 0.4 && mdEnergy < totalEnergy * 0.4 && rdEnergy < totalEnergy * 0.4 [Energy Balancing]
 		error UNNAMED No unnamed objects are allowed Not Ignored
